command: echo '=== MT5 Process ===' && ps aux | grep -i 'terminal64\|metatrader\|wine' | grep -v grep && echo '=== EA files ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/' && echo '=== AutoTrading check ===' && grep -i 'autotrading\|expert\|allow' '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/config/common.ini' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No common.ini' && echo '=== MT5 Config ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/' -name '*.ini' -exec echo '--- {} ---' \; -exec cat {} \; 2>/dev/null | head -100 && echo '=== uptime ===' && uptime && echo '=== Wine time vs system ===' && date -u && DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine wine cmd /c 'echo %date% %time%' 2>/dev/null
